summary: Phase 3 Reviews Testing Complete - Backend 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend review UI fully functional with guest login prompt, authenticated user review form, character counter with min length warning, edit/delete buttons for own reviews, and multilingual support (EN/IT/FR verified).
critical_code_review_comments: XSS prevention working - HTML tags are properly escaped via html.escape()
One review per user per recipe enforced (upsert behavior on POST)
Validation: rating 1-5 enforced, comment min_length=10 max_length=2000
user_review field correctly returned for authenticated users, null for guests
Rate limiting: 5 reviews per hour per user (implemented in backend)
Character counter shows red warning 'Minimum 10 characters' for 1-9 chars
Date formatting respects locale (IT: '4 mar 2026', FR: '4 mars 2026')
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user phase1final@test.com (username: phase1user) and recipe pizza-margherita-italy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Reviews complete. All endpoints tested: POST/PUT/DELETE /recipes/{slug}/review (auth required, 401 for guests), GET /recipes/{slug}/reviews (guest allowed, returns user_review for logged-in users). Frontend review section shows login prompt for guests, review form for authenticated users. Character counter visible with min 10 char warning. Edit/delete buttons appear for user's own review. Translations verified for EN/IT/FR.

backend_reviews_api.TestReviewsAuth: 4/4 passed - create/update/delete require auth (401), GET reviews allows guests
backend_reviews_api.TestReviewsValidation: 6/6 passed - comment <10 chars 422, rating 0 422, rating 6 422, valid ranges accepted
backend_reviews_api.TestReviewsCRUD: 5/5 passed - create, upsert on duplicate, get user_review, update, delete
backend_reviews_api.TestXSSPrevention: 2/2 passed - HTML tags escaped, special characters escaped
backend_reviews_api.TestReviewsNonExistent: 2/2 passed - 404 for non-existent recipe on create and get
backend_reviews_api.TestReviewsDataIntegrity: 3/3 passed - username in review, created_at timestamp, average recalculated

frontend_reviews_ui.Guest /en/recipe page: PASS - Shows login prompt with Login/Sign Up buttons
frontend_reviews_ui.Authenticated user view: PASS - Shows Your Review section with edit/delete icons, Edit Review button
frontend_reviews_ui.Character counter: PASS - Shows 'X/2000' with 'Minimum 10 characters' red warning when 1-9 chars
frontend_reviews_ui.Italian /it/recipe page: PASS - 'Valutazioni e Recensioni', 'Accedi', 'Registrati', 'Recensioni Recenti', date '4 mar 2026'
frontend_reviews_ui.French /fr/recipe page: PASS - 'Notes et Avis', 'Connexion', 'S'inscrire', 'Avis Récents', date '4 mars 2026'

verified_features: POST with comment < 10 chars returns 422 validation error
POST with rating outside 1-5 returns 422 validation error
POST duplicate review for same recipe updates existing (upsert behavior)
GET /api/recipes/{slug}/reviews returns reviews list (works for guests)
GET returns user_review field for authenticated users (null for guests)
XSS prevention: HTML tags in comment are escaped via html.escape()
Reviews contain username, rating stars, created_at date
Frontend: Review form visible only when logged in
Frontend: Guest sees login prompt in review section
Frontend: Character counter shows min length warning when 1-9 chars typed
Frontend: Review list displays correctly with username, rating stars, date
Frontend: Edit Review button appears for user's own review
Frontend: /it/ recipe page shows Italian review strings
Frontend: /fr/ recipe page shows French review strings
